subject: A large haunted stuffed bear toy with a monstrous gaping mouth and a doll face stitched onto its torso, bearing clawed limbs
description: A large stuffed bear, tattered and tan-colored, looms with its mouth open wide to reveal rows of sharp teeth. A round baby-doll face with blank eyes is stitched directly onto the bear's chest, ringed with crude stitching. The bear's forelimbs end in long pale claws. Red spikes or thorn-like shapes emerge from the lower portion of the image. The setting appears to be night, with a suggestion of an eerie dark background and a muted moonlit sky. The bear has visible fur wear and tear, with patches of fluff escaping. The overall effect is a corrupted childhood object made predatory.
foreground: Tattered stuffed bear with fanged mouth, doll face on chest, clawed paws, red thorns below
emotion: predatory menace — fanged mouth, forward tilt, claws raised, doll face adding uncanny innocence to the threat
